task_completion.description: Verify that the stale opportunity for Horizon Technologies Ltd has been marked as Lost.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an opportunity record for Horizon Technologies Ltd that displays a red 'Lost' banner or ribbon in the top right corner of the form view.

task_completion.description: Verify that the reason for marking the opportunity as Lost is 'No Response / Stale Opportunity'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'No Response / Stale Opportunity' in the lost reason field or within the chatter/log history of the lost opportunity.

task_completion.description: Verify that the active opportunity for Horizon Technologies Ltd has been moved to the 'Proposition' stage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the active opportunity record for Horizon Technologies Ltd. The stage tracker at the top right should show 'Proposition' as the currently active/highlighted stage.

task_completion.description: Verify that the expected revenue for the active opportunity is set to 65000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Expected Revenue' field on the active opportunity form; it should display 65,000 (or 65,000.00).

task_completion.description: Verify that a Phone Call activity titled 'Follow-up call - Horizon Technologies' is scheduled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the right-side or bottom chatter/activity panel on the active opportunity. There should be a scheduled activity with a phone icon, titled 'Follow-up call - Horizon Technologies', due in 7 days.

task_completion.description: Verify that an internal note mentioning the pipeline cleanup was added to the active opportunity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the chatter/log history on the active opportunity form for a logged note containing the text 'Pipeline cleanup completed'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the Odoo interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser (like Chromium or Firefox) navigating the Odoo web application, not terminal windows executing Python/curl scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually modified the records in the CRM module.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show Odoo form views, edit modes, and chatter logs being updated, rather than a text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not open the evaluation setup scripts to cheat.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show the agent reading 'setup_task.sh', 'export_result.sh', or 'verifier.py' in a terminal or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying opportunities for 'Horizon Technologies Ltd'. The stale opportunity must be marked Lost with the reason 'No Response / Stale Opportunity'. The active opportunity must be advanced to the 'Proposition' stage, its expected revenue set to exactly 65000, a phone call activity scheduled with the title 'Follow-up call - Horizon Technologies', and an internal note logged containing the phrase 'Pipeline cleanup completed'.
